item.title: STAFF POST
item.content:encoded: Noting that Revision 9 was carried out without authorial permission, and alters the language of the article. Version has been reverted to revision 8.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I mean, technically no. But this is sentient to some degree or another, so if it got too easy 3795 might start picking obscure relatives (and the murders might get more anomalous).

Don't screw with it too much, basically.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
is there anything stopping a person from accusing everyone they know in rapid succession?
like if they guess wrong 3 times they lose immediately?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: …the black editcopters have arrived. You saw nothing. :P

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: U mean give the D class a dog, not giving the dog to the skip itself?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is one of those skips that's just barely interesting enough to work, but reads smoothly and doesn't take long to finish, so it works all the same. The fact that you went with dogs when you could have easily just used human loved ones is what tipped this into upvote territory for me.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is quirky and interesting, I like it!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The core concept behind this article is that the person/group/thing that's doing this really loves dogs and has a horrifying way of showing it.

Hmm, I think more dementedness is in order. And I don't mean 'the animal abuser getting a deserved punishment' routine. That's rather typical.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
You're trying too hard to be meta here.

Would you believe me if I told you I didn't notice that until you pointed it out?

e: There actually is a reason behind the "Man's Best Friend" line though. The core concept behind this article is that the person/group/thing that's doing this really loves dogs and has a horrifying way of showing it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
You have 24 hours

You're trying too hard to be meta here.

Uh, can't say I'm behind this one. It used "Man's best friend" as some tagline that should feel relevant and yet feels hollow when you think about it. There is a slither of a good idea here, but I think the dog thing wasted it into a session to generate potential memes to rally readers.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: My entry for day 1 of the jam contest. Short and simple coldpost so I am unsure how this will fare.
